name: Slam
description: A heavy, crushing blow with a limb, appendage, or body mass.

name: Claw
description: A raking strike with natural claws, designed to tear flesh.

name: Bite
description: A powerful snap of fanged jaws.

name: Necrotic Touch
description: A touch that draws vitality from the living. On a hit, the target also takes 1d6 necrotic damage that cannot be healed until the creature completes a short rest.

name: Tendril Lash
description: A whipping strike from a long, muscular appendage with surprising reach.

name: Rending Claw
description: A vicious, hooking strike meant to tear and destabilize. On a hit, if the target is wearing armor, their AC is reduced by 1 until the armor is repaired.

name: Grasping Limb
description: The creature attempts to seize and restrain a target. On a hit, the target is also grappled (escape DC {dc}).

name: Bone Spike
description: A natural spike of exposed bone used as a stabbing weapon.

name: Psychic Slam
description: A physical strike accompanied by a burst of psychic pressure. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Intelligence saving throw or be unable to take reactions until the start of its next turn.

name: Tail Sweep
description: A powerful horizontal sweep of a heavy tail. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

name: Numbing Touch
description: A freezing grasp that steals warmth and slows the body. On a hit, the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of its next turn.

name: Ember Strike
description: The creature's limb burns with inner fire. On a hit, the target catches alight and takes 1d6 fire damage at the start of its next turn unless it uses an action to douse the flames.

name: Stone Fist
description: A blow of compressed stone or dense metal. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be knocked back 10 feet.

name: Glamour Touch
description: A caress laced with fey enchantment. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the end of its next turn. While charmed, the target cannot make attacks against the creature.

name: Acid Lash
description: A strike that leaves a corrosive residue. On a hit, the target's AC is reduced by 1 until it cleans the acid off (requires an action). This penalty can stack up to three times.

name: Savage Gore
description: A brutal horn or spike attack. This creature must move at least 10 feet in a straight line before attacking with this. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

name: Rusted Blade
description: A corroded weapon that leaves festering wounds. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or take 1d4 piercing damage at the start of each of its turns for 1 minute. The condition ends when the target receives any magical healing.

name: Thunder Slam
description: A strike accompanied by a burst of concussive force. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be deafened until the end of its next turn and pushed 5 feet away.

name: Searing Strike
description: The creature's blow burns with holy or infernal light. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the start of its next turn.

name: Corpse Grip
description: Cold dead fingers seize and hold. On a hit, the target is also grappled (escape DC {dc}).

name: Spectral Claw
description: An ethereal limb tears through the spirit as much as the flesh. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

name: Pixie Sting
description: A tiny blade coated in soporific fey poison. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

name: Crushing Bite
description: Massive jaws clamp down and refuse to let go. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be restrained until the start of its next turn.

name: Soul Rend
description: A strike that tears at the spiritual essence of a living creature. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

name: Infernal Brand
description: A burning strike that sears a sigil of dread into the target. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the start of its next turn.

name: Void Touch
description: Contact with an entity from beyond floods the mind with alien terror. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

name: Mind Spike
description: A physical strike accompanied by an overwhelming psychic lance. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Intelligence saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

name: Frost Grasp
description: Fingers of living ice seize a limb and lock it in place. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be restrained until the end of its next turn.

name: Iron Grip
description: A mechanical vice-like hand locks around the target with crushing force. On a hit, the target is also grappled (escape DC {dc}).

name: Piston Slam
description: A hydraulic-powered strike with devastating impact. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

name: Constricting Coils
description: The creature wraps around its prey, squeezing the life from it. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be restrained until the start of its next turn.

name: Venomous Bite
description: Fangs pump venom into the wound. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

name: Pounce
description: The creature leaps onto its prey with startling speed. If this creature moved at least 15 feet straight toward the target before this attack, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

name: Barbed Tail
description: A whipping strike from a tail lined with venomous barbs. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

name: Crushing Coils
description: The creature wraps its massive body around the target. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be restrained until the start of its next turn.

name: Stunning Blow
description: A perfectly placed strike that rattles the senses. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

name: Wing Buffet
description: A powerful downstroke of massive wings sends targets tumbling. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

name: Enchanted Strike
description: A blow woven with compulsive magic that bends the target's will. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the end of its next turn.

name: Sand Scour
description: The creature drives a gale of grit and shards into the target's face. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the start of its next turn.

name: Maul
description: A savage two-handed overhead blow with a heavy weapon or massive limb that pulverizes bone.

name: Shortsword Flurry
description: Two rapid cuts that leave the target bleeding and off-balance.

name: Whip Crack
description: A long, flexible weapon lashes out with blinding speed to strip defenses and punish the unwary.

name: Spear Thrust
description: A disciplined lunge with a long-hafted weapon, keeping the target at a distance.

name: Executioner's Strike
description: A deliberate, powerful downward blow aimed at an exposed neck or joint, dealing heavy damage.

name: Thorn Whip
description: A vine covered in razor thorns strikes out and drags the target 10 feet closer if it is Large or smaller.

name: Dream Blade
description: A weapon that cuts both flesh and thought. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or lose concentration on any spell it is maintaining.

name: Draining Grasp
description: A touch that siphons vitality directly. On a hit, the creature regains hit points equal to half the damage dealt, and the target's hit point maximum is reduced by that amount until it finishes a long rest.

name: Withering Touch
description: A draining caress that saps the target's mobility. On a hit, the target's speed is reduced by 15 feet until the end of its next turn.

name: Wing Strike
description: A sweeping strike with the leading edge of a massive wing, slashing through the air.

name: Tail Spike
description: The creature whips its tail in a powerful piercing lunge, impaling targets beyond arm's reach.

name: Corruption Touch
description: A touch that poisons the target's capacity for healing. On a hit, until the end of the target's next turn, it cannot regain hit points.

name: Dissolving Touch
description: A corrosive appendage eats away at armor and flesh alike. On a hit, the target's AC is reduced by 1 until the end of its next turn (maximum -3).

name: Lava Strike
description: A fist of solidified magma that splashes molten rock on impact. On a hit, the target takes an additional 1d6 fire damage at the start of its next turn unless it uses an action to extinguish the burning.

name: Storm Punch
description: A crackling strike that discharges stored lightning through the target. The target cannot take reactions until the start of its next turn.

name: Gear Grind
description: Rotating blades or exposed gears catch the target and tear into them with mechanical precision.

name: Grinding Mandibles
description: Chitinous crushing mouthparts clamp down with mechanical force on the target.

name: Horn Thrust
description: A sharp natural horn driven forward with full body weight behind it, seeking gaps in armor.

name: Rake
description: The creature slashes rapidly with both forelimbs, leaving multiple deep lacerations across the target.

name: Multi-Bite
description: Multiple fanged heads or appendages strike simultaneously from different angles, making the attack impossible to fully dodge.

name: Death Roll
description: The creature bites down and twists viciously, tearing off chunks of flesh. On a hit, the target takes maximum damage if it was already grappled by this creature.

name: Sweeping Strike
description: A wide horizontal arc that punishes clustered enemies. On a hit, one other creature adjacent to the target also takes the damage as the swing continues.

name: Overhead Smash
description: A crushing two-handed blow delivered from maximum height, driving the target downward with tremendous force.

name: Pommel Crack
description: A vicious strike with the weighted end of a weapon, targeting the skull or temple. On a hit, the target has disadvantage on their next attack roll.

name: Battering Rush
description: The creature charges forward with full body weight, slamming into the target. On a hit, the target is pushed 10 feet in a direction of this creature's choice.
